hooks.command: bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; INPUT=$(cat); NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .name); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .cwd); WORKTREE_DIR="$CWD/.claude/worktrees/$NAME"; git -C "$CWD" worktree add "$WORKTREE_DIR" -b "$NAME" >&2; if [ -d "$CWD/target" ]; then ln -sfn "$CWD/target" "$WORKTREE_DIR/target" >&2; fi; echo "$WORKTREE_DIR"'

bash -c 'set -euo pipefail; INPUT=$(cat); WORKTREE_PATH=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .worktree_path); CWD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r .cwd); if [ -L "$WORKTREE_PATH/target" ]; then rm "$WORKTREE_PATH/target" >&2; fi; git -C "$CWD" worktree remove --force "$WORKTREE_PATH" >&2 || true'
